project_type: Next.js 14 static export dashboard with Azure Functions API and ML notebooks
build_system: pnpm for frontend and API. next build with output: 'export' for static site.
test_framework: Vitest with @testing-library/react, jsdom environment, tests in frontend/__tests__/
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build to verify static export succeeds. 2. Run pnpm test:ci to verify all tests pass.
environment_constraints: Static export (output: 'export') - no server routes. All data must be static in lib/ files. COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - pnpm install works. Do NOT use bash heredocs for file creation - use fs_write tool directly.
contribution_requirements: Keep i18n working - add sidebar keys to TranslationKeys type and both en.ts/id.ts. Keep all existing functionality intact.
key_patterns: Pages are in frontend/app/(dashboard)/<route>/page.tsx. Data files are in frontend/lib/<name>-data.ts. Chat intelligence is in FloatingChatPanel.tsx getEnhancedResponse(). Sidebar nav uses lucide-react icons and TranslationKeys type. Translation types must match across types.ts, en.ts, and id.ts. Charts use Recharts (BarChart, PieChart, etc.).
directory_structure: frontend/app/(dashboard)/ - dashboard pages (clustering, credit-scoring, umkm, etc.). frontend/lib/ - data files, utils, translations. frontend/components/ - UI components (chat/, dashboard/, ui/, landing/). api/src/functions/ - Azure Functions endpoints. ml/data/ - ML output data. docs/ - documentation.
